candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; appears twice but with same values and is the standard total revenue figure. Prefer this over balancing item per rules.
Balancing construct, only used if main Total revenue were missing; lower priority per instructions.

variables.notes: Selected the clear top-line revenue row as primary; no need for balancing item as primary.

candidates.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility
candidates.why: Only candidate provided that clearly corresponds to direct material/production-related costs; mapped as COGS even if many values are currently nan.

final_choice.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility

variables.notes: Only available COGS-type candidate; even if sparsely populated, schema rule says presence implies values in some year.

candidates.why: Broad operating overhead bucket excluding explicit COGS/DA labels; appropriate SG&A proxy when detailed SG&A may be underpopulated.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A labor component; clearly part of SG&A overhead and not a total; should be included as SG&A component.
Classic SG&A-type overhead component; not labeled as total; should be part of SG&A components.
Explicit SG&A line; appears mostly empty in preview, so per rule (b) include it along with broader overhead buckets/components to capture earlier years.
Liability account, not an income statement expense; included in candidates list but not conceptually an SG&A expense flow, so should not be selected.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Applied rule (b): explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty, so include it plus main overhead bucket and clear SG&A components. Excluded balance-sheet ‘Accrued Operating Expenses’ as it is not an expense flow.
No R&D-related candidate rows provided; treat XRD as missing/zero per instructions.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense and other financial expenses
candidates.why: Income statement line aggregating interest expense with other financial expenses; valid but less pure than the dedicated interest expense line.
Dedicated interest expense line on the income statement; best representation of XINT per instructions.
Derivative-related gain/loss, not pure interest expense; should not be primary XINT.
Unrealized derivative valuation effects, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Loss on previously held equity interest
candidates.why: One-off loss on equity interest, not an interest expense.
Attribution of profit, not an interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of interest on lease liabilities; a component of total interest expense and suitable as a backup line for XINT.
Equity account, not an interest expense.
Debt balance, not an expense.
Debt balance, not an expense.

candidates.row_label: Written put option over non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Equity/derivative obligation, not an interest expense.
Debt principal, not expense.
Equity account, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense and other financial expenses
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list: pure interest expense first, then combined interest/financial expenses, then supplemental lease-interest component. Other candidates are derivatives, equity items, or balance-sheet amounts and were excluded.

candidates.row_label: Loss on previously held equity interest
candidates.why: P&L item, not an equity balance; inappropriate for BE.

candidates.row_label: Changes in the fair value of equity investments designated at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: OCI flow item, not the equity stock balance.
Supplemental P&L/ownership info, not total book equity.
Label present but appears unused (all nan) and narrower than total equity; less suitable than explicit total equity lines.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Explicit total equity for parent shareholders; standard measure of book equity for common owners.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; good backup if owner-only equity missing.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Chose equity attributable to owners as primary BE, with Total Equity as secondary in case of missing data for some years.

candidates.why: Represents profit attributable to NCI in the income statement, not the balance-sheet minority interest; better suited to flows than the stock MIB variable.
Balance-sheet line for NCI; a valid representation of minority interest equity.

candidates.row_label: Written put option over non-controlling interest
candidates.why: Derivative/obligation related to NCI, not the NCI equity itself; should not be primary MIB.
Explicit minority interest equity line; clearly a direct measure of MIB on the balance sheet.
Income statement allocation of profit to minority interest, not the equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Total comprehensive income before deducting minority share; not the minority equity balance.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet minority equity lines for MIB (primary: ‘Minority Interest’; secondary: ‘Non-controlling interests’). Income statement NCI rows and put option were excluded for this stock variable.
